seoTitle: Upper Daintree vs Upper Dawson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Upper Daintree and Upper Dawson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Upper Daintree vs Upper Dawson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Daintree and Upper Dawson.
heading: Upper Daintree vs Upper Dawson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Daintree, Queensland and Upper Dawson, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Daintree has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Upper Dawson (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Daintree or Upper Dawson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Daintree has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Upper Dawson scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Daintree scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Dawson scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Daintree or Upper Dawson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Daintree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
